title: Backend Performance Tuning Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on optimizing backend performance and resource usage.

questions.question: Which of the following is a primary strategy for reducing database load in a backend application?
options: Increasing the number of database connections to infinity
Storing all data in the file system

questions.question: What is the meaning of 'Latency' in the context of backend performance?
options: The number of requests handled per second
The time taken to process a single request and return a response
The total size of the application source code
The number of concurrent users supported
